summary: Validated backend + frontend for embedded dashboard symptom chat. All requested feature checks passed. /api/analyze-symptoms is MOCKED by design and returned expected shape.

critical.issue: Auth flow does not set an app auth session cookie (httpOnly cookie expectation not met; only Cloudflare __cf_bm cookie observed).
No brute-force lockout behavior after 5 failed login attempts (attempts 1-6 all returned 401).

minor.issue: Preflight response observed access-control-allow-origin: * instead of explicit allowed origin with credentials policy.
No seed_admin update flow found to rotate existing admin password when changed.

action_items: If cookie-based auth is required by playbook, implement app-owned httpOnly session cookie on login.
Add brute-force protection (lockout/rate-limit) after 5 failed login attempts.
Fix CORS policy at app/edge so credentialed flows use explicit origin, not wildcard.
Implement/validate seed_admin idempotent update behavior if admin password changes.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard embedded chat integration is correctly wired to /api/analyze-symptoms and renders severity labels.
Route-level redirect from /chat to /dashboard is correctly implemented in App.js.
Auth security playbook checks are partially missing in backend implementation (lockout, seed_admin lifecycle, cookie session model).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used demo credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Requested dashboard chat and /chat redirect behaviors are working on public URL. Remaining gaps are auth playbook/security checks and CORS/cookie behavior.
rca of the issue: RCA-1: Repeated failed login attempts are handled statelessly (simple credential check -> 401) with no attempt counter/lockout persistence, so brute-force threshold behavior never triggers. Mitigation: add per-user/IP attempt tracking with TTL and lockout response code (e.g., 429/423). RCA-2: Cookie-based auth is not implemented in app login response (JWT returned in JSON body and stored client-side), so httpOnly session-cookie requirement is unmet. Mitigation: set secure httpOnly auth cookie (SameSite policy + rotation) and adjust frontend auth handling. RCA-3: CORS wildcard observed at public edge preflight, conflicting with strict credentialed-origin policy. Mitigation: enforce explicit allowlist at ingress/proxy and ensure Access-Control-Allow-Credentials true with non-* origins.
